# Vibe Browser - AI Web Agent & Agentic Operations

> Vibe Browser is an AI-powered browser co-pilot that lets users control any website with natural language. It also offers Agentic Team, a multi-agent AI system for autonomous SaaS operations.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.vibebrowser.app/): Vibe Browser product page. AI web agent that automates browser tasks using natural language.
- [Teams](https://www.vibebrowser.app/teams): Vibe Browser for Teams. Shared AI automation with workflow sharing, admin controls, and unified billing.
- [People](https://www.vibebrowser.app/people): Personal AI assistant for everyday tasks. Email management, scheduling, bill tracking, job applications.
- [Enterprise](https://www.vibebrowser.app/enterprise): Enterprise-grade AI browser with TEE-based security, SOC 2 compliance, and self-hosted deployment.
- [Lawyers](https://www.vibebrowser.app/lawyers): AI for legal professionals. TEE-protected legal research, case management automation.
- [Recruiters](https://www.vibebrowser.app/recruiters): AI for recruiting. LinkedIn automation, skills-based sourcing, CRM integration.
- [Sales](https://www.vibebrowser.app/sales): AI for sales teams. Gmail integration, CRM automation, outreach automation.
- [Researchers](https://www.vibebrowser.app/researchers): AI for academic and market research. Database search, paper analysis, citation management.
- [Developers](https://www.vibebrowser.app/developers): Browser automation with MCP. Connect to Claude, Cursor, or any AI coding agent.
- [Investors](https://www.vibebrowser.app/investors): AI for investors. Stock research, Morningstar reports, portfolio analysis.
- [Crypto & DeFi](https://www.vibebrowser.app/crypto): AI for crypto. DeFi research, APY comparison, portfolio rebalancing.
- [Tax](https://www.vibebrowser.app/tax): AI tax preparation. Automated form downloads, tax estimation, return filing assistance.
- [Cloud](https://www.vibebrowser.app/cloud): VibeBrowser Cloud — agentic browser infrastructure. Chrome DevTools MCP in the cloud. Deploy Chrome instances globally, expose securely to AI agents over HTTPS. No extension required.
- [MCP](https://www.vibebrowser.app/mcp): Vibe Browser for Agents. Connect real browser sessions to MCP-compatible AI agents.
- [OpenClaw](https://www.vibebrowser.app/openclaw): Vibe Browser for OpenClaw. Command-oriented browser CLI and relay workflow for OpenClaw-style agent control.
- [Compare](https://www.vibebrowser.app/compare): Feature comparison between Vibe Browser and alternatives.
- [About Us](https://www.vibebrowser.app/aboutus): Meet the Vibe Technologies team.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.vibebrowser.app/privacy): Vibe Browser privacy policy.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.vibebrowser.app/terms): Vibe Browser terms of service.

## Blog Posts

- [MCP CLI Chrome DevTools Fallback](https://www.vibebrowser.app/blog/implementing-vibebrowser-mcp-cli-chrome-devtools-fallback): How VibeBrowser MCP and CLI implement extension-first routing with transparent Chrome DevTools fallback — one set of commands works in real browser and headless CI environments.
- [Vibe Co-Pilot vs Claude for Chrome](https://www.vibebrowser.app/blog/vibe-copilot-vs-claude-for-chrome): Direct comparison of Vibe Co-Pilot and Claude for Chrome — model choice, secrets vault, MCP, pricing, and self-hosted options.
- [Agentic Browsers: Atlas, Comet, Composite vs VibeBrowser](https://www.vibebrowser.app/blog/agentic-browsers-atlas-comet-composite-vs-vibebrowser): Comparison of next-gen AI browsers — OpenAI Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Composite, and Vibe.
- [MCP Browser Automation Comparison](https://www.vibebrowser.app/blog/mcp-browser-automation-comparison): How browser automation tools compare when exposed as MCP servers for AI coding agents.
- [Playwright MCP vs VibeBrowser MCP](https://www.vibebrowser.app/blog/playwright-mcp-vs-vibebrowser-mcp): Technical comparison between Playwright MCP and VibeBrowser MCP for agentic browser control.
- [Chrome DevTools MCP vs Playwright MCP](https://www.vibebrowser.app/blog/chrome-devtools-mcp-vs-playwright-mcp): When to use Chrome DevTools Protocol vs Playwright for AI agent browser automation.
- [OpenClaw Browser CLI vs Vibe Browser Co-Pilot](https://www.vibebrowser.app/blog/openclaw-browser-cli-vs-vibe-browser-copilot): Comparing terminal-first OpenClaw CLI with Vibe's browser extension approach.
- [Grok 4 Fast Reasoning: Best Agentic Model](https://www.vibebrowser.app/blog/grok-4-1-fast-reasoning-best-agentic-model): How Grok 4 performs on agentic browser tasks compared to GPT-5 and Claude.
- [GPT-5 Support and Kimi-K2.5 Free Tier](https://www.vibebrowser.app/blog/gpt-5-4-support-and-kimi-k2-5-free-tier): Vibe adds GPT-5 support and moves Kimi-K2.5 to the free tier.
- [A11y vs Markdown Browser Agent System Design](https://www.vibebrowser.app/blog/a11y-vs-markdown-browser-agent-system-design): Why Vibe uses accessibility trees over markdown for browser state extraction.
- [Reflection & Verification Layer](https://www.vibebrowser.app/blog/reflection-verification-layer): How Vibe's agent reflection loop improves task completion accuracy.
- [We Forked OpenCode — Here's What We Changed](https://www.vibebrowser.app/blog/we-forked-opencode-heres-what-we-changed): Why Vibe forked OpenCode and what modifications power Vibe's coding agent.
- [Late April 2026 Progress Update](https://www.vibebrowser.app/blog/vibe-may-2026-progress-update): Vibe product updates for late April 2026 — models, features, partnerships.
- [6 Months Momentum](https://www.vibebrowser.app/blog/2026-03-17-6-months-momentum): Six months of Vibe growth — users, models, and what's next.
